decision: Live reviewer lifecycle evidence is not accepted yet. Authentication was refreshed, but the latest hardened F3 run stopped at the Claude session limit before targeted re-review and commit completed.
observations: R3 was a harness/CLI defect: print-mode slash command shorthand returned Unknown command before model work.
R4 entered a live review flow but used inline controller edits, missing review package/report dispatch fields, and hit the max-budget cap before completion.

R5 completed a full behavioral review/remediation loop, but it did not use REVIEW_PACKAGE_PATH/REVIEW_REPORT_PATH and its targeted re-review report fails review-report.mjs validation when checked with accepted finding ids.

After routing hardening, R6 used REVIEW_PACKAGE_PATH and REVIEW_REPORT_PATH for UNIT_REVIEW and the analyzer reported no structural violations, but the run hit the Claude session limit before TARGETED_REREVIEW and final commit completed.

No Phase 3B.2 evidence is accepted until one live stream shows review package, reviewer invocation, report validation with package, adjudication, remediation, targeted re-review validation with accepted ids, and final gate/commit completion.

attempts.label: F3 R5
attempts.reason: Missing literal review package/report dispatch fields and targeted re-review validation fails with accepted finding ids.

attempts.label: F3 R6
attempts.reason: Review package/report dispatch fields were observed and analyzer violations were zero, but the session limit stopped before targeted re-review completion.
